layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid for Services (Asymmetrical), Dense Grid for Admin

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A4F2A] text-white hover:bg-[#3A8B3A] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#0A4F2A] text-[#0A4F2A] hover:bg-[#0A4F2A] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300

cards.service: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow border border-[#E8DFD0] group

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#F5EBDD]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#D2C4B0]/30

ui_patterns.inputs: bg-white border-[#D2C4B0] focus:ring-[#3A8B3A] rounded-lg px-4 py-3

image_strategy.style: Soft, natural light, organic textures, authentic Ayurvedic elements. Avoid generic clinical spa images.
image_strategy.overlays: Use subtle gradient overlays (from bottom #0A4F2A to transparent) for text readability on images.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Playfair Display'.
Ensure 2-3x generous spacing between sections (py-24 or py-32).
No gradients on text. Use solid, high-contrast colors.
Footer must be high contrast (Dark Green background) with all compliance links.
Language switcher must be easily accessible in the nav bar.

steps: 1. Setup Tailwind config with the custom color palette (forest green, cream).
2. Install 'lucide-react' for icons and '@radix-ui/react-icons' if needed.
3. Create the 'LanguageContext' to handle EN/NL switching globally.
4. Build the Layout (Nav, Footer) with compliance text.
5. Implement the Service Catalog with Cart functionality (Context based).
6. Build the Admin Dashboard (Services CRUD, Bookings view) - Keep it clean/dense.
7. Ensure the Booking Flow captures: Service, Date, Time, User Details.
